InoxItemCategory.title: InoxItemCategory
InoxItemCategory.description: Represents a category of stainless steel items (e.g., tubes, sheets).

description.description: A more detailed description of items within this category.

InoxItem.title: InoxItem
InoxItem.description: Represents a specific stainless steel item with its specifications and pricing.

weightPerMeter.description: Calculated weight per meter of the item.

costPrice.description: Cost price of the item per meter. This will be overridden by the universal settings if it is enabled.

marginPercentage.description: Margin percentage applied to the cost price.  This will be overridden by the universal settings if it is enabled.

sellingPrice.description: Calculated selling price of the item per meter.

UniversalSettings.title: UniversalSettings
UniversalSettings.description: Represents the universal cost and margin settings that apply to all items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the settings (only one set of settings exists).

costPrice.description: Universal cost price to be applied to all items.

marginPercentage.description: Universal margin percentage to be applied to all items.

applyUniversally.description: Flag to indicate whether the universal settings should be applied.

definition.description: Stores categories of stainless steel items.

params.name: inoxItemCategoryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the inox item category.

definition.description: Stores specific stainless steel items with their specifications and pricing.

params.name: inoxItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the inox item.

definition.description: Stores the universal cost and margin settings that apply to all items.

params.name: universalSettingsId
params.description: The unique identifier of the universal settings document (should be a single document ID).

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to support the Inox PriceCalc application, focusing on stainless steel item catalogs, weight/price calculations, and real-time updates. The design adheres to the core principles of Authorization Independence, Clarity of Intent, DBAC (Database-Based Access Control), and QAPs (Queries are not Filters).

**Authorization Independence (Denormalization):** Authorization Independence is achieved through denormalization. There's no need for user-specific private data. Access to item categories, items and universal settings is global so authentication is not required for read operations.

**Structural Segregation:** The structure segregates different data types into separate collections, each with a homogeneous security posture. `InoxItemCategory`, `InoxItem`, and `UniversalSettings` are at the root level and publicly accessible.

**Access Modeling:** Data is modeled for clarity and consistency. Path-based ownership is not required because there's no user-owned data.

**QAPs (Queries are not Filters):** The design enables secure `list` operations. Because roles and ownership is not relevant, QAP is less of a factor in this design.
